heading: MongoDB Vector Search Indexing
body:
You must index the fields to search using the [$vectorSearch](pipe.$vectorSearch)
stage inside a [index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type index
definition. You can index the following types of fields in a MongoDB Vector Search
[index definition](avs-types-vector-search) type index definition:

- Fields that contain text as [autoEmbed](avs-types-auto-embed) type.

- Additional fields as the [index definition](avs-types-vector-search)
  type to enable vector search on pre-filtered data.
